brand.name: AvizSazeh

hero.headline: Architectural Engineering Systems for Metal Ceilings
hero.subheadline: From Design Intelligence → Engineering Logic → Execution Reality
hero.description: We engineer ceiling systems, not products. Transforming architectural concepts into precise, manufacturable and executable systems.
hero.cardTitle: A ceiling is an engineered system — not a product.
hero.cardText: We integrate design, engineering, materials and installation into high-performance ceiling systems.

definition.title: A ceiling is an engineered system — not a product
definition.text: The AvizSazeh Architectural Engineering System (AECS) transforms ceiling design into structured execution logic. Every system is defined by structural logic, architectural constraints, and execution feasibility.

systems.title: Engineered Metal Ceiling Systems
systems.description: Precision-engineered solutions for performance, aesthetics and long-term reliability.

engineering.title: From design to buildable reality
engineering.description: Translating architectural intent into controlled execution across four structured stages.

steps.title: Design
steps.text: Define architectural intent, spatial geometry, and functional requirements.

steps.title: Engineering
steps.text: Structural validation, material selection, and shop / production drawings.

steps.title: Manufacturing
steps.text: Controlled fabrication from approved drawings, with quality control.

steps.title: Execution
steps.text: Precise installation by the field team and contract-based delivery.

execution.title: Controlled execution — at any height and climate

capabilities.title: Technical & engineering office
capabilities.text: Experienced engineers producing custom shop, production, and installation drawings.

capabilities.title: Field team
capabilities.text: Installation crews across Iran and neighbouring countries; any climate, up to 50 m height.

capabilities.title: Project control
capabilities.text: Minimised delivery time with daily progress reporting from contract start.

capabilities.title: Quality guarantee
capabilities.text: Authenticity and quality warranty on every product.

systemsPage.title: Ceiling Engineering Systems
systemsPage.intro: AvizSazeh defines ceiling solutions as architectural engineering systems rather than products. System selection is based on architectural geometry, load requirements, functional zoning, and execution constraints.
systemsPage.principle: Architecture defines the problem. Engineering defines the solution. Execution defines reality.

systemDetail.ctaTitle: Is this the right system for your project?
systemDetail.ctaText: Submit your project specifications for engineering evaluation and system selection.

engineeringPage.title: Engineering & Execution System
engineeringPage.intro: Design is meaningless until it becomes a buildable system. AvizSazeh bridges architectural design and real-world execution, reducing project risk through engineering-driven ceiling systems.
engineeringPage.processTitle: Three steps to a professional ceiling

process.title: Inquiry & consultation
process.text: Receive project information, assess needs, and provide a technical and financial proposal.

process.title: Contract & production
process.text: Finalise design, scheduling, and transparent pricing; sign the contract and manufacture.

process.title: Installation & delivery
process.text: Precise fabrication and installation per contract, delivered on time.

projectsPage.title: Projects & Clients
projectsPage.intro: AvizSazeh's engineering credibility comes from real project output. Below is a selection of organisations and projects where our systems have been executed.
projectsPage.note: Detailed project case studies will be published with real technical data.

aboutPage.title: The translator between architecture and execution
aboutPage.lead: AvizSazeh Naghsh Jahan is an architectural engineering system brand that transforms architectural intent into buildable ceiling systems through engineering, customisation, and controlled execution.
story: The core AvizSazeh team has worked in suspended metal ceilings since the 1990s, specialising in equipping assembly and industrial halls in close collaboration with architects and contractors.

With a technical office of experienced engineers, the company produces custom execution, production, and installation drawings for every project, and minimises delivery time through a dedicated project-control team.
AvizSazeh holds cooperation agreements with Italian and Turkish companies, and its systems integrate with CBI Europe radiant systems.
principles: Every design must translate into an executable system.
Material selection without engineering is a risk.

contactPage.title: Connect with the engineering team
contactPage.intro: Contact us for technical consultation, inquiry, or to define a project.
